race.comment: MISS SLIPSTREAM (9) made light work of her maiden when resuming off 314 days and the subsequent form from the race has been very strong. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Kept fresh with 33 days in-between and keeps Crowther. Leading player. PANTOJA (1) should be nearing his peak now with two solid hit-outs under his belt. Is going better than his form reads and gets his chance to put his best foot forward. NOSIE BY NATURE (11) returns and is a noted fresh performer. Now under the care of the Bain & Taylor partnership and has been readied with a jump-out win here. Makes appeal. RUNAWAY BELLE (12) lacks early speed but has as strong turn of foot. If she can utilise the inside draw, she will cause some headaches.
